title: Vizle's CPVP Pack
description: Crystal PvP Pack for Minecraft. FPS Boosting, Reduces Lag and generally Optimizes your CPvP experience!
body:
Want Minecraft to run smoother, look better, and feel cleaner for Crystal PvP? This modpack includes 50+ client-side mods that boost FPS, improve visuals, and add helpful QoL tweaks.

⚡ Better Performance: Higher FPS and reduced lag.
🎯 Crystal PvP Friendly: Clearer visuals, easier tracking, and smoother mechanics.
🌿 Visual Tweaks: Adjustable shield position, no fire overlay, improved particles, and lightweight graphic upgrades.

Fully client-side and optional for server side, and easy to customize—add your own mods on top if you want.
If you want a smoother, cleaner Minecraft experience, this pack has you covered ✨
